heading: Authority of Railroad Retirement Board
label: 1011 Authority of Railroad Retirement Board
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I (§ 101 et seq.) of , , , known as the Rock Island Railroad Transition and Employee Assistance Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–25494 Stat. 399section 1001 of this titleMay 30, 1980
amendments: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I (§ 101 et seq.) of , , , known as the Rock Island Railroad Transition and Employee Assistance Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–25494 Stat. 399section 1001 of this titleMay 30, 1980

children.label: a
children.text: The Board may prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out its duties under this chapter.

children.label: b
children.text: In carrying out its duties under this chapter, the Board may exercise such of the powers, duties, and remedies provided in subsections (a), (b), and (d) of as are not inconsistent with the provisions of this chapter.section 362 of this title
